critical_findings.title: Phantom Positions & Reconciliation Gap
critical_findings.description: Claimed P&L diverges from real balance change. Gap widening: Apr8=-15.84, Apr9=anomaly, Apr10=-25.96. Root: POS WARNING at Apr10T03:28 shows API=0 but local=14. Bot logs phantom +6.44 settlement. Pattern likely repeats silently on all settle paths.
critical_findings.action_required: Do NOT resume trading until v255 position sync fix deployed

critical_findings.title: v254 Partially Deployed, Diagnostics Not Firing
critical_findings.description: v254 binary IS running (yes_dollars firing confirms it). Four diagnostic features wired but not triggering daily: OB_FORMAT_DIAG, HARVEST_BLOCKED, TIME_BDI_LOW (conditions not met, not bugs). Issues #2 and #3 fixes are in code but validation incomplete.
critical_findings.action_required: Monitor for trigger conditions. Fixes presumed working based on code inspection.

critical_findings.title: Harvest System 12.4% Success Rate
critical_findings.description: 78% failure rate. Root: yes_bids:ABSENT | no_bids:ABSENT in all MISS DIAGs. v254 OB parser fix is wired but conditions need thinning. Evening session: 8/8 harvests succeeded (late afternoon recovery suggests book thickness matters).
critical_findings.action_required: Monitor evening harvest behavior. Deploy harvest gate fix (anchor±0.02). Investigate book thickness correlation.

critical_findings.title: HIGH+COUNTER Sizing Overexposed
critical_findings.description: Two mechanically identical -26.75 losses (Conv 7.2, ~43c, same pattern). Evidence from 3 trades (Apr7, Apr8), not statistical variance. Simulation shows fix saves +20.25 on one trade. Risk: continued COUNTER oversizing leads to catastrophic losses.
critical_findings.action_required: Approve COUNTER sizing cap: risk_multiplier = min(1.00, current). Add MAX_CONTRACTS=15 hard ceiling.

critical_findings.title: Harvest Gate Selling Below Entry
critical_findings.description: Apr8 13:00 and Apr9: SPHI_DECAY sold at 0.60 when entry was 0.87 (SHORT on NO). Bot sold BELOW entry price, violating profit-taking logic. Fix: gate on anchor±0.02 instead of entry_price±0.05.
critical_findings.action_required: Implement harvest gate fix immediately in v254.

critical_findings.title: BDI=0 Hold Adding Slippage, No Benefit
critical_findings.description: Apr7 and Apr8: BDI=0 triggered hold→forced exit→same or worse price. Hold added zero value, only slippage cost. Fix: remove BDI=0 hold logic, exit cleanly on stop trigger.
